data.content:
Implementation complete.

Branch: worktree-knots-7dda-scope-events
Commit: ac24b912a69fe43fe5f2b8bc5d3331ae442beabc

Verification:
- All four scope-event acceptance criteria are covered by tests.
- New tests (all pass):
  - events::tests_ext::knot_scope_set_payload_uses_spec_keys
  - events::tests_ext::knot_scope_set_payload_omits_absent_fields
  - app::tests_scope_events::rehydrate_restores_full_scope_metadata_from_events
  - app::tests_scope_events::rehydrate_merges_partial_scope_event_into_prior_scope
  - app::tests_scope_events::rehydrate_preserves_field_absence_through_round_trip
  - app::tests_scope_events::rehydrate_without_scope_events_yields_default_scope
- Production code unchanged; scope event path was already wired end to end.
- make sanity passes: fmt, clippy (-D warnings), file sizes, full cargo test (1161 passed),
  npm run test-release (4/4), and tarpaulin coverage at 95.05% (>= 95 threshold).

Notes for reviewer:
- Replay semantics for knot.scope_set are REPLACE, not deep-merge. This is intentional:
  ScopePatch::apply_to pre-merges before emission, so the on-disk payload always carries
  the full merged state. Test rehydrate_merges_partial_scope_event_into_prior_scope
  documents this contract explicitly.
- Backward-compat for knots with no scope events: RehydrateProjection seeds
  ScopeData::default() and the apply_event _ => {} catch-all preserves it. Covered by
  rehydrate_without_scope_events_yields_default_scope.
